name: 09_both_fail_resets_count
description: Both magnitude and MC sanity gates fail. Count resets to 0; hit=False.
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: -1.05 <= -1.0 - 0.10 = -1.10 is FALSE (-1.05 > -1.10). MC: 70.0 < 60.0 is FALSE. Combined `mag AND mc` = False AND False = False. Condition fails -> reset branch. new_count = 0; hit = False. Count was 2 in; the inline producer's else-branch unconditionally sets below_stop_count = 0 (no decrement).
